meta.question: Which colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used multikinase inhibitor as control?

results.input_question: Which colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used multikinase inhibitor as control?

candidate.question: Trials where Cancer type is Colorectal
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal';
candidate.parent_question: List trials of Atezolizumab for Multiple Myeloma with overall follow-up longer than 21 months?

candidate.question: Which trials have Cancer type equal to Colorectal?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials of Atezolizumab for Colorectal cancer used a multikinase inhibitor as the control?

candidate.question: List the NCT IDs for trials with Cancer type = 'Colorectal'.
candidate.parent_question: Which Phase 3 trials evaluating PD-L1 monotherapy for colorectal cancer should I review, and what are their treatment regimens?

candidate.question: Trials with Cancer type = 'Colorectal'?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal';
candidate.parent_question: Find Colorectal cancer trials with at least 4 arms where the control treatment was Chemo/Anti-EGFR?

candidate.question: What Cancer type values exist for trials where Cancer type = 'Colorectal' and Class of ICI = 'PD-L1' and Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria = 'No'?
candidate.sql: SELECT DISTINCT "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD-L1' AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No';
candidate.parent_question: Show the cancer type and trial phase for colorectal cancer trials using PD-L1 where PD-L1 positivity was not required for participation?

candidate.question: Among those, which have at least 4 arms?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 4;
candidate.parent_question: Which trials for Colorectal cancer had at least 4 arms and used Chemotherapy as a control?

candidate.question: What trials have Number of arms >= 2?
candidate.sql: SELECT "Author", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Number of arms" >= 2;
candidate.parent_question: Which trials for esophageal or gastroesophageal junction cancer had at least 2 arms and used chemotherapy as a control?

candidate.question: What trials have Number of arms >= 1?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Number of arms" >= 1;
candidate.parent_question: Which renal cell cancer trials had at least 1 treatment arm and used an mTOR inhibitor as a control?

candidate.question: Which trials have Number of arms greater than or equal to 4?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Number of arms" >= 4;
candidate.parent_question: Which trials for bladder cancer had at least 4 arms and used chemotherapy as a control?

candidate.question: Among Melanoma trials, which have 3 or more arms?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Number of arms" >= 3;
candidate.parent_question: Which Melanoma trials had 3 or more arms and used Chemo as a control?

candidate.question: Which trials have Control arm equal to Multikinase inhibitor?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials of Atezolizumab for Colorectal cancer used a multikinase inhibitor as the control?

candidate.question: For Melanoma trials with Chemo as the Control arm, what is the NCT and the Control regimen?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Control regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';
candidate.parent_question: Which Melanoma trials used Chemotherapy as the control treatment?

candidate.question: What is the Treatment regimen for trials where the control arm is 'Antibody-drug conjugate'?
candidate.sql: SELECT "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'Antibody-drug conjugate';
candidate.parent_question: Which clinical trials used an antibody-drug conjugate as the control?

candidate.question: Which trials have Control arm = 'mTOR inhibitor'?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Control arm", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'mTOR inhibitor';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials for Renal cell cancer used an mTOR inhibitor as the control arm?

candidate.question: Which trials have Control arm = 'mTOR inhibitor'?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Control arm" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'mTOR inhibitor';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials for Renal cell cancer used an mTOR inhibitor as the control treatment?

candidate.question: Trials where Cancer type is Colorectal
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal';
candidate.parent_question: List trials of Atezolizumab for Multiple Myeloma with overall follow-up longer than 21 months?

candidate.question: Which trials have Cancer type equal to Colorectal?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials of Atezolizumab for Colorectal cancer used a multikinase inhibitor as the control?
